candidate.completion: send someone before I start rating conversations with the microwave five stars.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send someone before I start rating conversations with the microwave five stars.

evaluation.rationale: A fresh image with a recognizable loneliness joke, but the turn is more comic escalation than clean conceptual reversal. "Microwave" and "five stars" land well, though the sentence is longer and less quotable than stronger wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
